caption:
Late nights in the lecture hall aren't just for studying—they're for secrets. 🌙👠

I'm the one everyone whispers about in the Arts Faculty, the 'Professor' with a body that defies the textbooks. 📖✨ Today, the power trip was mine. I adjusted the silk blouse, feeling the cool fabric against my skin, knowing the dark blue pencil skirt clung to every curve I wore with pride. The air smelled of old paper and expensive perfume, a mix that made my pupils sit up straighter. 👀💼

One student stayed late. Just one. Not for the assignment. He leaned against my desk, his eyes tracing the line of my throat, lingering dangerously low before meeting mine. The fluorescent lights buzzed overhead, but the heat between us was electric. 🔥 We traded syllabus notes for whispered promises under the guise of grading papers. His hand brushed mine, a spark that traveled down my spine. I knew if I leaned in, the rules would break. I smiled, knowing he'd never forget the view behind the desk. 🕯️🍷

#UniversityVibes #ProfessorLife #CurvesAndBooks #SecretAdventures #LecturerStyle #ElegantAndWild #OfficeHours #CampusRomance #SensualEducation #InstaProfessor
